channel.title: Easy on Moe's VR blog
channel.description: Recent content in Easy on Moe's VR blog

item.title: HTB Permx
item.description: Permx walkthrough OS: Linux, Difficulty: Easy Enumeration Ports scan: nmap -p- -sCV 10.10.11.23 PORT STATE SERVICE VERSION 22/tcp open ssh OpenSSH 8.9p1 Ubuntu 3ubuntu0.10 (Ubuntu Linux; protocol 2.0) | ssh-hostkey: | 256 e2:5c:5d:8c:47:3e:d8:72:f7:b4:80:03:49:86:6d:ef (ECDSA) |_ 256 1f:41:02:8e:6b:17:18:9c:a0:ac:54:23:e9:71:30:17 (ED25519) 80/tcp open http Apache httpd 2.
